news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance Launches STSM: The First 2X Short ETF for Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Short TSM ETF (STSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited (NYSE: TSM), less fees and expenses. STSM was launched on Nov 18, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
